targets.notes: Refactor to use core/stripe, core/email, and core/queue for all billing and notifications.
Adopt core modules for wallet pass billing and lifecycle emails.
Align verification SaaS flows with core billing, email, and auth helpers.
Subscription billing and notifications should be wired into core/stripe and core/email.
Transition from pricing-only to full checkout using core/stripe patterns.
Mirror CookiesPass core integration for Vercel/Replit variant.
